title: Proof of signature of articles of vessels
doc_html:
§426.  Proof of signature of articles of vessels

A copy of the articles of any vessels, authenticated by the affidavit of the captain, shall be prima facie evidence that any seaman whose name appears subscribed thereto has actually signed articles.
doc_text:
§426.  Proof of signature of articles of vessels
A copy of the articles of any vessels, authenticated by the affidavit of the captain, shall be prima facie evidence that any seaman whose name appears subscribed thereto has actually signed articles.
